event: Fruit sellers along a Venetian canal
description: A narrow Venetian canal runs through the center of the composition between tall, aging stucco buildings with shuttered windows, balconies, and laundry hanging from upper floors. In the foreground, a young woman in a white blouse and dark blue skirt leans against a stone railing or bridge parapet, holding a yellow straw hat and looking contemplatively toward the viewer. Below her, bunches of yellow melons or gourds hang over the water. At the far left, another woman in a red shawl stands near baskets of fruit under a large stone archway.

_meta.title: Fruit Sellers from the Islands, Venice
